requirement.title: REQ-1742
requirement.requirement: 5. Playback Control: For multiple simultaneous users, the player application provides the standard playback controls (like browsing playlists, playback, pause, skip track, seek within track, etc.) and advanced controls like ``auto-playback'' (when a new source becomes available), ``auto-pause'' (when receiving a phone call), ``playtime last mode'' (for resuming the playback of audiobooks) or ``play similar'' (playing songs of the same genre, style, etc.).
